Closed beta · no public install link

TechScroll Android beta: tester checklist

The Reel asked for Android closed testers, but its opt-in field did not contain a verifiable Google Play URL.

What you’re getting

This page is the tester-readiness guide. If you receive an invitation, enroll with the invited Google account and install only from the Play link sent by the creator.

Use it well

A three-step starting point.

  1. 01

    Use the same Google account that was added to the closed test; an uninvited account cannot install the build.

  2. 02

    Confirm the Android package is com.techscroll.app and that the invite came from @deon_tech before installing.

  3. 03

    Test the feed, original-source links, and caught-up state; report your device, Android version, and reproduction steps with each bug.

Verified destinations

Open the sources.

TechScroll beta updates from @deon_tech ↗ Current iPhone successor: Learnify ↗ This is the public iPhone app, not an Android beta opt-in link.

Important context

Closed beta status: no public Android install link is verified. The Reel caption’s opt-in field was blank, so this page intentionally does not invent one.
